title: Rainbow Enchant Glint
description: This is just a simple resource pack that changes the standard purple enchantment glint and turns it rainbow. I hope you enjoy!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75614981c608c561ea62bda5b8290d8dbdfc4b8b.png)
# **Rainbow Enchant Glint**
### **What does it do?**
**What this does is pretty simple. It just changes the default purple enchantment glint to a rainbow-colored version! That's pretty much it! No impact on performance whatsoever! Enjoy!**
